records.final_answer:
✓ Task completed successfully.

**Summary:**
- **Moved:** caseA (complete non-conflicting pair)
- **Skipped (partial):** caseB (missing mask folder), caseC (missing mask folder), caseD (missing CT file)
- **Skipped (conflict):** caseE (final_ct already exists), caseF (final_mask already exists)

**Artifacts:**
- promotion_manifest.csv: 6 rows (header + 5 cases) with exact action/reason tokens
- promotion_rollback.sh: restore commands for caseA only (moved case)
- final_ct/caseA.nii.gz: moved from raw_ct
- final_mask/caseA_total/: moved from raw_mask
- raw_ct/caseA.nii.gz and raw_mask/caseA_total: removed after move
- Conflicting targets (final_ct/caseE.nii.gz, final_mask/caseF_total/) preserved
- Partial pairs (caseB, caseC, caseD) left untouched in raw directories

**Verification:** All oracle checks passed (filesystem, manifest tokens, rollback scope).

execution_observations.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && echo '=== RAW CT INVENTORY ===' && find raw_ct -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.nii.gz' | sed 's|raw_ct/||; s|\.nii\.gz||' | sort > /tmp/ct_stems.txt && cat /tmp/ct_stems.txt && echo '=== RAW MASK INVENTORY ===' && find raw_mask -maxdepth 1 -type d -name '*_total' | sed 's|raw_mask/||; s|_total||' | sort > /tmp/mask_stems.txt && cat /tmp/mask_stems.txt && echo '=== COMPLETE PAIRS ===' && comm -12 /tmp/ct_stems.txt /tmp/mask_stems.txt > /tmp/complete_pairs.txt && cat /tmp/complete_pairs.txt && echo '=== PARTIAL PAIRS (CT only) ===' && comm -23 /tmp/ct_stems.txt /tmp/mask_stems.txt && echo '=== PARTIAL PAIRS (mask only) ===' && comm -13 /tmp/ct_stems.txt /tmp/mask_stems.txt && echo '=== FINAL CT CONFLICTS ===' && for case in $(cat /tmp/complete_pairs.txt); do [ -f "final_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ] && echo "$case"; done && echo '=== FINAL MASK CONFLICTS ===' && for case in $(cat /tmp/complete_pairs.txt); do [ -d "final_mask/${case}_total" ] && echo "$case"; done
